summary: 3D animated video set to music with narration. A cartoon worker in suspenders and a tool belt kneels on a sunlit rooftop over a suburban neighborhood, arrives home at dusk to a house interior, and holds a White House letter reading 'NO TAX ON OVERTIME' signed by Donald Trump while a yellow dog sleeps nearby. Narration includes 'the American hustle', 'no longer taxing your overtime', 'He promised, and he delivered', and 'You did the time. Now keep every dime.'

script.scene: Animated worker (suspenders, tool belt with hammer) kneels smiling on a shingled rooftop, sun behind him over a cartoon suburban neighborhood. Narration about the country built on sacrifice and 'the American hustle.'

Interior of an animated home at dusk: the worker comes through the front door, smiling, and sets mail on an entry table with a digital clock reading about 11:30; children's crayon drawings and a hat rack on the wall. Narration: 'he followed through with his working family's tax cuts by no longer taxing your overtime.'

Overhead shot of the gloved worker at the table holding a White House letter; a yellow dog sleeps on the floor, a hard hat hanging nearby. Narration: 'It's a new day for the American worker because he's rewarded the grind.'

Close-up of the letter: 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON / NO TAX ON OVERTIME.' with Trump's signature, an open envelope and a lamp beside it. Narration: 'No tax on overtime. He promised, and he delivered.'
Animation resolves into a White House line-drawing with text reading 'President Donald Trump' on black. Narration: 'You did the time. Now keep every dime.'

notable_text: NO TAX ON OVERTIME (signed Donald Trump); THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON; tweet: 'reward the American hustle... rewarding the grind: NO TAX ON OVERTIME'; narration: 'You did the time. Now keep every dime.'
